issues.explanation: The paragraph references Q4 2025 data when the as-of date is 2025-08 (August 2025). For any standard fiscal calendar, Q4 2025 would end after August 2025 (calendar year Q4 = Oct-Dec; Adobe fiscal year ending November Q4 = Sep-Nov). Complete Q4 2025 financial data should not be available at an August 2025 as-of date, making this a scope violation.
issues.recommended_fix: Either update the as-of date to a period after Q4 2025 closes (e.g., 2025-12 or later), or revise the paragraph to only reference quarters that would be complete as of August 2025 (e.g., Q1 2025, Q2 2025, and potentially preliminary Q3 2025).
